x_winning_move_label: {winning_rule_text} Which labeled empty cell lets X complete a three-in-a-row?
{winning_rule_text} Which option is X's immediate winning move?
{winning_rule_text} Choose the labeled empty cell where X completes a line.
{winning_rule_text} Which labeled cell should X play to make three in a row?
{winning_rule_text} Which empty-cell label completes a line for X?
o_winning_move_label: {winning_rule_text} Which labeled empty cell lets O complete a three-in-a-row?
{winning_rule_text} Which option is O's immediate winning move?
{winning_rule_text} Choose the labeled empty cell where O completes a line.
{winning_rule_text} Which labeled cell should O play to make three in a row?
{winning_rule_text} Which empty-cell label completes a line for O?
x_blocking_move_label: {winning_rule_text} O has exactly one immediate winning line. Which labeled empty cell should X play to block it?
{winning_rule_text} Choose the labeled cell where X blocks O's immediate win.
{winning_rule_text} Which option stops O from completing three in a row on the next move?
{winning_rule_text} Which labeled empty cell should X occupy to block O's threat?
{winning_rule_text} Select the cell label for X's blocking move against O.
o_blocking_move_label: {winning_rule_text} X has exactly one immediate winning line. Which labeled empty cell should O play to block it?
{winning_rule_text} Choose the labeled cell where O blocks X's immediate win.
{winning_rule_text} Which option stops X from completing three in a row on the next move?
{winning_rule_text} Which labeled empty cell should O occupy to block X's threat?
{winning_rule_text} Select the cell label for O's blocking move against X.
piece_count_in_layer: How many {target_player} pieces are in the {target_layer_label} layer?
Count the {target_player} pieces in the {target_layer_label} layer.
What is the number of {target_player} pieces in the {target_layer_label} layer?
Determine how many {target_player} marks appear in the {target_layer_label} layer.
How many {target_player} marks are on the {target_layer_label} layer?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_tic_tac_toe_3d: three stacked 3 by 3 layers of a 3D Tic-Tac-Toe board, ordered from top to bottom
code_prompt_defaults.tic_tac_toe_3d_winning_rule_text: A line can run within one layer, straight through the layers, diagonally across a face, or diagonally through all three layers.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_x_winning_move_label: set "annotation" to an array containing [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for the three board cells that form the completed winning line for X
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_x_winning_move_label: set "answer" to only the selected option letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_o_winning_move_label: set "annotation" to an array containing [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for the three board cells that form the completed winning line for O
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_o_winning_move_label: set "answer" to only the selected option letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_x_blocking_move_label: set "annotation" to an array containing [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for the blocking cell and the two O cells in the immediate threat line
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_x_blocking_move_label: set "answer" to only the selected option letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_o_blocking_move_label: set "annotation" to an array containing [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for the blocking cell and the two X cells in the immediate threat line
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_o_blocking_move_label: set "answer" to only the selected option letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_piece_count_in_layer: set "annotation" to an array containing pixel-coordinate [x, y] points at the centers of all {target_player} pieces in the requested layer
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_piece_count_in_layer: set "answer" to the number of {target_player} pieces in the requested layer
